stonetop.summary: A bored, can't-lie mammoth-spirit emissary whose idleness has soured into cruelty.

system.concept: A bored, can't-lie mammoth-spirit emissary whose idleness has soured into cruelty.
system.description: @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.oi5Mg2wPABRjvHri]{The Rime Lords} created these mighty spirits to act as emissaries and spies. A few still remain, tethered to the meditation-halls in which they were made but roaming the Whitefangs in search of novelty and diversion. They have grown bored in their masters' absence, and from boredom has grown a subtle cruelty. The people of the Whitefangs treat them with respect, for they are still the emissaries of the Rime Lords — but they also know better than to trust their counsel.
